name: SIFCO INDUSTRIES INC
business: SIFCO produces forgings, sub-assemblies, and machined components primarily for the Aerospace and Energy markets, including aerospace and defense, commercial space, energy, and semiconductor industries.

exposures.sentence: SIFCO is engaged in the production of forgings, sub-assemblies, and machined components primarily for the Aerospace and Energy ( A&E ) markets.
SIFCO supplies new and spare components to the U.S military for aircraft, helicopters, vehicles, and munitions.

SIFCO supplies components to the commercial space industry, which is experiencing rapid growth driven by increased launch cadence, expansion of satellite constellations, reusability, and new entrants.
SIFCO supplies components used in semiconductor manufacturing industry.
SIFCO supplies new and spare components to the energy sector.
